network_summary: Webster Dental Care is a Chicago-area multi-location dental group founded in 1976 by Dr. Steven Rempas DDS. As of 2018-2020 it operated 11-12 locations across Chicagoland. A separate management entity — Webster Dental Management — is documented via the official website (webdentalchicago.com footer links to websterdentalmanagement.com/about/) and appears as parent_company in NPPES records for two of the four cluster locations. The organization has recruited an external CEO (Michael Errin Rios, 2020), has a formal management/MSO layer, and describes itself as 'an industry leading dental service organization.' No PE backing was found in any source; as of 2018 it was explicitly 'owned by two dentists, without any venture capital partners.' The Cicero location (ZIP 60804) is marked CLOSED on Yelp as of May 2026.

mso_platform_pe_evidence: Webster Dental Management is a documented management/MSO entity: the official practice website webdentalchicago.com lists a separate leadership team page at websterdentalmanagement.com/about/. NPPES records list 'WEBSTER DENTAL MANAGEMENT' as parent_company on two cluster locations. The organization appointed an external CEO (Michael Errin Rios) in 2020, describing WDC as 'an industry leading dental service organization.' No PE sponsor identified; as of 2018 Group Dentistry Now documented it as 'owned by two dentists, without any venture capital partners.' MSO/management layer confirmed; PE=false. Source: https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/webster-dental-care-announces-new-interim-chief-executive-officer-301139244.html and https://www.webdentalchicago.com/ and https://www.groupdentistrynow.com/dso-group-blog/group-dentistry-nows-emerging-dental-groups-to-watch-in-2018/
stale_closed_false_positive_notes: Cicero location (location_id 3bc304a7819a234f, 6130 W Cermak Rd, ZIP 60804) is marked CLOSED on Yelp as of May 2026 (https://www.yelp.com/biz/webster-dental-care-of-cicero-cicero). This location has no EIN and no parent_company in NPPES; it may be a shell/closed NPI that should be flagged stale. All other three locations (Evanston, Edison Park, Lakeview) appear actively operating as of 2026.
evidence_chain: AO signal: STEVEN REMPAS appears as authorized_official on 4 Chicagoland GP locations under the 'Webster Dental Care' brand across ZIPs 60201/60631/60657/60804. Documentary corroboration: (1) NPPES records list 'WEBSTER DENTAL MANAGEMENT' as parent_company on two locations, establishing a management-entity layer; (2) the official website webdentalchicago.com links to websterdentalmanagement.com as a separate leadership/management site; (3) a 2020 PR Newswire press release describes WDC as 'an industry leading dental service organization' and announced an external CEO appointment, confirming centralized DSO governance; (4) a 2019 PR Newswire release confirms WDC as a strategic buyer for Chicagoland practices, describing 'over 12 locations' and a growth platform; (5) a 2018 Group Dentistry Now profile confirms Steven Rempas as founder/dentist-owner with no PE partners. Conclusion: branded_dso with pe_backed=false — a dentist-founded, management-company-backed DSO brand with confirmed MSO layer.
future_app_notes: Webster Dental Management entity should be verified via Illinois Secretary of State search (websterdentalmanagement.com TLS cert was invalid at time of research — site may need re-check). Cicero location (3bc304a7819a234f) should be validated as closed/stale and potentially reclassified to solo_inactive or removed from active denominators. Webster Dental Care has 8-12 total locations per public sources — the 4 in our watched-IL ZIPs are only a subset; other WDC locations (Berwyn, Hoffman Estates, La Grange Park, Portage Park, Skokie) may be in non-watched ZIPs. If the Cicero NPI is confirmed closed, stale_closed_note should be applied. Future confirmation: check if websterdentalmanagement.com resolves (TLS issue in 2026-06) and pull their leadership/management services page as primary DSO-structure evidence.
